data.name: Be My Lust
data.detailed_description:
Be My Lust brings back the classic breakout game with some unique brick set up for each level. 

Player controls the paddle with left and right key to bounce the ball back and forward. Once all bricks are cleared, player gets to see one girl in her uniform, and the fun part, without her uniform. 

For a price of cup of coffe, player will experience:

- Classic breakout gameplay.

- Beautiful images.

- Relaxing soundtrack.

- Enjoyable game experience.

data.short_description: Be My Lust - is an erotic game set in a univerise far far away, in which you will have to break all the cubes to discover different girls with and without their uniform. This game is designed for adults (18+) only.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DiretX 9
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
